name: zenith-erp-la-cima
description: Sistema ERP y E-commerce B2B/B2C para Mayor de Repuesto La Cima, C.A.

scripts.db:reset: cd backend && node -e "require('fs').unlinkSync('database/zenith_erp.sqlite')" && npm run db:seed
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install
scripts.build:netlify: cd backend && npx tailwindcss -i ./src/assets/css/input.css -o ./public/output.css --minify && npm run db:generate

author: La Cima, C.A.
